title: cicerbita lessertiana var. lyrata
intro: Cicerbita lessertiana var. lyrata, also known as Cicerbita lyrata, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae, commonly found in high-altitude grasslands and meadows. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cicerbita lyrata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antispasmodic, making it a natural remedy for conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Cicerbita lyrata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
